LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - DEFENDANTS CONSTRUCTIVE WORKS GROUP, INC. AND JOHN NITTOLO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JUNE 11, 2009 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE ON THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY ON THE CASE CITED BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY ON OR BEFORE JUNE 11, 2009. EACH SIDE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN NITTOLO, DEFENDANT; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS LISA KRIM'S and BRIAN KRIM'S Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment IS Granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*after hearing, the court signs separate forms of order and judgment*

Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS LISA KRIM & BRIAN KRIM'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal - The request to set aside dismissal is denied as unnecessary. The Court does not need to vacate the dismissal in order to consider Plaintiffs' motion for entry of judgment. (Wackeen v. Malis (2002) 97 Cal. App. 4th 429, 439-440.) Plaintiff may file a motion for entry of judgment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
